## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Click on ...
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots.

## Area

Which part of the app is affected?

- [ ] Pokemon browse / article
- [ ] Trainer browse / article
- [ ] Game hub / game-scoped pages
- [ ] Search / compare
- [ ] Data generation scripts
- [ ] General

## Environment

- **Browser:** (e.g., Chrome 124, Firefox 126)
- **OS:** (e.g., Windows 11, macOS 15)
- **Device:** Desktop / Mobile

## Console Errors

If applicable, paste any browser console errors.
